creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Joe Marcus Clarke worote:
 
> I have your previous version of this patch running on bento now.  I had
> to modify it to apply to some of the ports.  However, I plan on
> committing the whole lot after the build finishes.

Thanks, I am standby to solve any conflicts.

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
